member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.AggregateMetrics
member.summary: Aggregate (mean) metric values across all non-errored golden cases in a run.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.AggregateMetrics.HitAtK
member.summary: Mean Hit@k (proportion of queries that had at least one relevant result in top-k).

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.AggregateMetrics.MeanPrecisionAtK
member.summary: Mean Precision@k.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.AggregateMetrics.MeanRecallAtK
member.summary: Mean Recall@k (known-item recall; see caveat in ).

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.AggregateMetrics.Mrr
member.summary: Mean Reciprocal Rank.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.AggregateMetrics.Map
member.summary: Mean Average Precision.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.AggregateMetrics.MeanNdcgAtK
member.summary: Mean NDCG@k.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.AggregateMetrics.MeanF1AtK
member.summary: Mean F1@k.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.AggregateMetrics.K
member.summary: The k value these aggregates were computed at.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.AggregateMetrics.EvaluatedCaseCount
member.summary: Number of cases included in the aggregate (excludes errored cases).

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.AggregateMetrics.ErroredCaseCount
member.summary: Number of errored cases (excluded from aggregates).

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.EvalOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for .

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.EvalOptions.K
member.summary: Default number of results to retrieve per query.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.EvalOptions.MaxConcurrency
member.summary: Maximum number of golden cases evaluated concurrently.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.EvalOptions.MaxRetries
member.summary: Number of times to retry a retriever call on transient failure before recording an error. Set to 0 to disable retries.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.EvalOptions.RetryBaseDelay
member.summary: Base delay for exponential backoff between retries. Effective delay for attempt n = * 2^n.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.EvalOptions.Observer
member.summary: Observer that receives lifecycle events during the run. Defaults to when .

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.EvalReport
member.summary: The full output of an evaluation run: aggregate metrics, per-query results, and run metadata.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.EvalReport.RunAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the run started.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.EvalReport.Aggregate
member.summary: Aggregate (mean) metrics across all non-errored cases.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.EvalReport.Results
member.summary: Per-query results in the order the golden cases were supplied.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.EvalReport.Options
member.summary: Options the run was configured with.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.EvalReport.RetrieverName
member.summary: Name of the retriever, used in reports and diffs. Derived from type name by default.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.EvalReport.GraderName
member.summary: Name of the grader, used in reports and diffs. Derived from type name by default.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.EvalReport.ErroredResults
member.summary: Convenience: results where is non-null.

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.EvalRunner
member.summary: Orchestrates an evaluation run: retrieves results for each golden case concurrently, grades them, computes per-query and aggregate metrics, and returns an .

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.EvalRunner.#ctor(RetriEval.Core.IRetriever,RetriEval.Core.IGrader,RetriEval.Core.EvalOptions)
member.param: The system under test.
Relevance judge applied to each retrieved chunk.
Run configuration. Defaults are applied when .

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.EvalRunner.RunAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{RetriEval.Core.GoldenCase},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Evaluates every case in and returns the aggregate report. Cases run concurrently up to . Retriever failures are captured per-case and do not abort the run.
member.param: The labeled evaluation cases to run.
Cancellation token. Cancelling stops new cases from starting.

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.IEvalObserver
member.summary: Receives lifecycle events from . Use to show progress, pipe to telemetry, or log intermediate results. Implementations must be thread-safe: events may fire from concurrent tasks.

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.IEvalObserver.OnCaseStarted(RetriEval.Core.GoldenCase)
member.summary: Called when a case is about to be evaluated.

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.IEvalObserver.OnCaseCompleted(RetriEval.Core.QueryResult)
member.summary: Called when a case has finished (successfully or with an error).

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.IEvalObserver.OnRunCompleted(RetriEval.Core.EvalReport)
member.summary: Called once after all cases have been evaluated.

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.NullEvalObserver
member.summary: No-op observer. Used when no observer is configured.

member.name: F:RetriEval.Core.NullEvalObserver.Instance
member.summary: Singleton instance.

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.ConsoleEvalObserver
member.summary: Writes a one-line progress update to for each completed case.

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.QueryMetrics
member.summary: All metric values computed for a single golden case.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryMetrics.HitAtK
member.summary: Hit@k: 1.0 if any relevant chunk appears in the top-k results, else 0.0.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryMetrics.PrecisionAtK
member.summary: Precision at cut-off k.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryMetrics.RecallAtK
member.summary: Recall at cut-off k, measured against the hand-labeled relevant set. See for the known-item caveat.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryMetrics.ReciprocalRank
member.summary: Reciprocal Rank: 1/rank of first relevant result, or 0.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryMetrics.AveragePrecision
member.summary: Average Precision.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryMetrics.NdcgAtK
member.summary: Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain at cut-off k.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryMetrics.F1AtK
member.summary: Harmonic mean of Precision@k and Recall@k.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryMetrics.K
member.summary: The k value used for all cut-off metrics.

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.QueryResult
member.summary: Evaluation result for a single golden case, including retrieved chunks, per-chunk relevance, per-query metrics, and any error that occurred.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryResult.CaseId
member.summary: ID of the golden case this result corresponds to.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryResult.Query
member.summary: The query string used.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryResult.Retrieved
member.summary: Chunks returned by the retriever in rank order.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryResult.Relevance
member.summary: Per-chunk relevance flags in the same order as . means the chunk was judged relevant by the .

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryResult.Gains
member.summary: Per-chunk gain values (used for NDCG).

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryResult.Metrics
member.summary: Computed metrics for this query.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryResult.Error
member.summary: Non-null when an exception was thrown during retrieval. Errored results are still included in the report; their metrics are zero.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.QueryResult.Category
member.summary: Category from the golden case, for grouping.

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.ChunkIdGrader
member.summary: Grades relevance by exact chunk-id membership.
member.remarks: This is the strictest and most trustworthy grader — a chunk is relevant iff its appears in . Requires stable, corpus-invariant chunk ids; re-chunking a document will invalidate the golden set. When is provided, returns the mapped value.

member.name: F:RetriEval.Core.ChunkIdGrader.Instance
member.summary: Singleton instance — the grader is stateless.

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.IGrader
member.summary: Decides whether a retrieved chunk satisfies a golden case. Implement this to plug in custom relevance logic (e.g. semantic similarity, LLM judge).
member.remarks: Implementations must be pure and thread-safe — may call them concurrently across multiple cases.

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.IGrader.IsRelevant(RetriEval.Core.RetrievedChunk,RetriEval.Core.GoldenCase)
member.summary: Returns when is relevant to .

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.IGrader.Gain(RetriEval.Core.RetrievedChunk,RetriEval.Core.GoldenCase)
member.summary: Returns the relevance gain for (used by NDCG). Defaults to binary: 1 if relevant, 0 otherwise. Override to supply graded gains from .

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.KeywordGrader
member.summary: Grades relevance by keyword presence in chunk content.
member.remarks:
A chunk is relevant iff its contains at least one keyword from . Matching is case-insensitive ordinal.
This grader is more resilient to re-chunking than but is fuzzier — a keyword match does not guarantee semantic relevance. Use when chunk ids are unstable or absent.

member.name: F:RetriEval.Core.KeywordGrader.Instance
member.summary: Singleton instance — the grader is stateless.

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.RetrievalMetrics
member.summary: Pure, deterministic retrieval evaluation metrics. All methods are stateless and operate on simple value types so they can be unit-tested independently of any retriever or grader.
member.remarks: Rounding is intentionally absent from these methods. Round only at the display/report boundary. All metrics return values in [0, 1] unless otherwise noted.

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.RetrievalMetrics.HitAtK(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean},System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns 1.0 if at least one relevant item appears in the top- results, else 0.0.
member.param: Boolean relevance flags in rank order (index 0 = rank 1). Must not be empty.
Cut-off rank. Clamped to [1, relevance.Count].

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.RetrievalMetrics.PrecisionAtK(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean},System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the fraction of the top- results that are relevant.
member.param: Boolean relevance flags in rank order.
Cut-off rank. Clamped to [1, relevance.Count].

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.RetrievalMetrics.RecallAtK(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the fraction of the known-relevant set that appears in the top- results.
member.param: Boolean relevance flags in rank order.
Cut-off rank. Clamped to [1, relevance.Count].
Total number of relevant items in the golden case (the denominator). Must be ≥ 1.
member.remarks: Known-item recall caveat: this measures recall against the hand-labeled relevant set, not against the entire corpus. The corpus may contain unlabeled relevant chunks that this metric cannot detect. Treat Recall@k as a lower bound.

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.RetrievalMetrics.ReciprocalRank(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Returns the reciprocal of the rank of the first relevant result (1/rank), or 0 if none found. Aggregate over a query set = Mean Reciprocal Rank (MRR).
member.param: Boolean relevance flags in rank order.

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.RetrievalMetrics.AveragePrecision(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Returns the Average Precision: mean of Precision@i at each rank i where a relevant item appears. Returns 0 when no relevant item is found. Aggregate over a query set = MAP.
member.param: Boolean relevance flags in rank order.

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.RetrievalMetrics.NdcgAtK(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Int32},System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain at cut-off . Supports both binary gains (0/1) and graded gains (any non-negative integer). Returns 0 when the ideal DCG is 0 (no relevant items).
member.param: Per-rank gain values in rank order (index 0 = rank 1, gain ≥ 0). Binary relevance: pass 1 for relevant, 0 for not relevant.
Cut-off rank. Clamped to [1, gains.Count].

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.RetrievalMetrics.F1AtK(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the harmonic mean of Precision@k and Recall@k. Returns 0 when both precision and recall are 0.
member.param: Boolean relevance flags in rank order.
Cut-off rank. Clamped to [1, relevance.Count].
Total known-relevant items. Must be ≥ 1.

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.RetrievalMetrics.Mean(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Double})
member.summary: Computes the arithmetic mean of a sequence of per-query metric values.
member.param: Per-query metric values (e.g. one RR per query).
member.returns: Mean value, or when is empty.

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.GoldenCase
member.summary: A single hand-labeled evaluation case pairing a query with its known-relevant chunks.
member.remarks:
Ground truth can be expressed three ways (combinable):
— strict id-based match. Most trustworthy; requires stable ids.
— chunk content must contain at least one keyword. Survives re-chunking.
— per-chunk gain scores for NDCG; falls back to binary when absent.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.GoldenCase.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for this evaluation case (used in reports and regression diffs).

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.GoldenCase.Query
member.summary: The natural-language query sent to the retriever.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.GoldenCase.RelevantChunkIds
member.summary: IDs of chunks considered relevant. An empty list means id-based matching is not used.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.GoldenCase.RelevantKeywords
member.summary: Keywords that, when present in a chunk's content, mark that chunk as relevant. Matching is case-insensitive ordinal. An empty list means keyword matching is not used.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.GoldenCase.GradedRelevance
member.summary: Optional per-chunk graded relevance (chunk id → gain value ≥ 0) for NDCG calculations. When , binary gains (0 or 1) are used.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.GoldenCase.Category
member.summary: Optional category tag for grouping results in reports.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.GoldenCase.Description
member.summary: Optional human-readable description of what this case tests.

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.RetrievedChunk
member.summary: A single chunk returned by a retriever, in descending relevance-rank order. All properties are immutable; create via the primary constructor or with expressions.
member.param: Stable identifier that must uniquely address the chunk within the corpus.
The raw text of the chunk.
Retriever-assigned relevance score (higher = more relevant). Scale is retriever-specific.
Optional bag of string metadata (e.g. source document, page number).

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.RetrievedChunk.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Double,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: A single chunk returned by a retriever, in descending relevance-rank order. All properties are immutable; create via the primary constructor or with expressions.
member.param: Stable identifier that must uniquely address the chunk within the corpus.
The raw text of the chunk.
Retriever-assigned relevance score (higher = more relevant). Scale is retriever-specific.
Optional bag of string metadata (e.g. source document, page number).

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.RetrievedChunk.Id
member.summary: Stable identifier that must uniquely address the chunk within the corpus.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.RetrievedChunk.Content
member.summary: The raw text of the chunk.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.RetrievedChunk.Score
member.summary: Retriever-assigned relevance score (higher = more relevant). Scale is retriever-specific.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.RetrievedChunk.Metadata
member.summary: Optional bag of string metadata (e.g. source document, page number).

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.MarkdownReporter
member.summary: Renders an as a GitHub-flavored Markdown document. Suitable as a CI artifact (e.g. appended to a pull-request comment or uploaded as a build artifact).

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.MarkdownReporter.#ctor(RetriEval.Core.MarkdownReporterOptions)
member.param: Display options. Defaults applied when .

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.MarkdownReporter.Render(RetriEval.Core.EvalReport)
member.summary: Renders the report to a Markdown string.

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.MarkdownReporter.WriteAsync(RetriEval.Core.EvalReport,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes the report to , creating or overwriting the file.

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.MarkdownReporterOptions
member.summary: Display options for .

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.MarkdownReporterOptions.Thresholds
member.summary: Optional thresholds used to compute pass/fail in the summary table.

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.MetricThresholds
member.summary: Pass/fail thresholds for each metric. Set a property to to omit the threshold column for that metric.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.MetricThresholds.HitAtK
member.summary: Minimum acceptable Hit@k.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.MetricThresholds.PrecisionAtK
member.summary: Minimum acceptable mean Precision@k.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.MetricThresholds.RecallAtK
member.summary: Minimum acceptable mean Recall@k.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.MetricThresholds.Mrr
member.summary: Minimum acceptable MRR.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.MetricThresholds.Map
member.summary: Minimum acceptable MAP.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.MetricThresholds.NdcgAtK
member.summary: Minimum acceptable mean NDCG@k.

member.name: P:RetriEval.Core.MetricThresholds.F1AtK
member.summary: Minimum acceptable mean F1@k.

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.InMemoryRetriever
member.summary: A deterministic in-memory retriever for tests and samples. Scores chunks by counting how many query words appear in the content (TF-style), breaking ties by insertion order. No external dependencies, no randomness.
member.remarks: This is not a production retriever — it is intentionally simple so that samples and unit tests run without any external services. Use a real adapter (AzureAISearch, Qdrant, …) for production evaluation.

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.InMemoryRetriever.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{RetriEval.Core.RetrievedChunk})
member.param: The full set of chunks to search over. Order determines tie-breaking.

member.name: T:RetriEval.Core.IRetriever
member.summary: The system under test. Returns chunks ranked by descending relevance to the given query.
member.remarks: Implement this interface once to plug any retrieval backend into the evaluation harness. Implementations should be thread-safe: may call concurrently across multiple golden cases.

member.name: M:RetriEval.Core.IRetriever.RetrieveAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves the top- chunks most relevant to . Results must be ordered by descending score (most relevant first).
member.param: The natural-language query.
Maximum number of results to return.
Cancellation token.
member.returns: A list of at most chunks in descending score order. May return fewer than items if the corpus is smaller.
